other_observers: Joyce Takamine; Steve Mlodinow & Tim Smart
specific_location: island in the So Platte River
description: This petite dove has a small, pink-based bill, scaling on the grayish head and breast, tan back and scapulars with dark brown markings, a short gray-brown tail with outer recs black and small white corners. It flight it showed maroon primaries.Behaviors: This bird flushed from the area marked on Steve Stakoviack's map as this bird's favorite hangout. It had been on the ground.Call: n/aPlumage: basic
